nasb.text: Therefore, I want younger widows to get married, bear children, keep house, and give the enemy no occasion for reproach;

esv.text: So I would have younger widows marry, bear children, manage their households, and give the adversary no occasion for slander.

cnv.text: 因此，我願年輕的寡婦結婚，生兒育女，管理家務，不給敵人有辱罵的機會；

ccb.text: 所以，我建议年轻的寡妇再嫁，生儿育女，料理家务，不要给仇敌毁谤的机会，

csbs.text: 所以，我希望年轻的寡妇结婚，生养儿女，料理家务，不给反对的人辱骂的机会。
